summary: Test suite covers core retention policies (MaxAge, KeepLatestN, MaxTotalSize) and dry-run mode with well-structured fixtures and a comprehensive verification scenario. However, it lacks rigor: no tests for edge cases (zero/negative policy values, boundary conditions, invalid inputs), error handling, input mutation, or policy interaction beyond one combined fixture. Workflow structure tests are shallow (file existence checks, not execution). Would catch obvious policy logic regressions but miss edge case bugs and error scenarios.
